name: format-toolbar
title: Format Toolbar
description: Rich text formatting toolbar with headings, marks, lists, callouts, and table row and column actions.

api.description: Rich text formatting toolbar for editor surfaces. Host owns document state through a controller.

props.name: controller
props.description: Command surface for formatting actions and pressed states. Pass null while the editor is unavailable.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables every control.

props.name: locked
props.description: Blocks edits and reports lock attempts when a control is pressed.

props.name: onLockedEditAttempt
props.description: Called when a locked control is pressed. Use for unlock hints.

props.name: isValidHref
props.description: Validates link URLs before Apply. Defaults to http, https, and mailto.

props.name: calloutLabel
props.description: Label for each callout option in the callout menu.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional styles on the toolbar root.

props.name: FORMAT_TOOLBAR_CALLOUT_TYPES
props.description: Callout types: note, tip, important, warning, caution.

props.name: FormatToolbarCalloutType
props.description: Callout type accepted by setCallout and isActive.

props.name: FormatToolbarQuery
props.description: Queries for isActive: bold, italic, strike, inlineCode, link, heading, paragraph, bulletList, orderedList, taskList, blockquote, callout, codeBlock, table.

props.name: FormatToolbarAttrs
props.description: Optional attrs for heading level and callout type queries.

groups.title: FormatToolbarController
groups.description: Host-owned command surface. Wire each method to the current selection and document. Block transforms no-op inside tables; marks and links apply in table cells.

props.name: isActive
props.description: Pressed state for a formatting query.

props.name: getLinkHref
props.description: Current link href at the selection, if any.

props.name: toggleHeading
props.description: Toggle heading level 1, 2, or 3 at the selection.

props.name: toggleBold
props.description: Toggle bold at the selection.

props.name: toggleItalic
props.description: Toggle italic at the selection.

props.name: toggleStrike
props.description: Toggle strikethrough at the selection.

props.name: toggleInlineCode
props.description: Toggle inline code at the selection.

props.name: setLink
props.description: Apply a link href to the selection.

props.name: unsetLink
props.description: Remove the link at the selection.

props.name: toggleBulletList
props.description: Toggle a bullet list at the selection.

props.name: toggleOrderedList
props.description: Toggle an ordered list at the selection.

props.name: toggleTaskList
props.description: Toggle a task list at the selection.

props.name: toggleBlockquote
props.description: Toggle a block quote at the selection.

props.name: setCallout
props.description: Apply a callout type at the selection.

props.name: unsetCallout
props.description: Clear the callout at the selection.

props.name: toggleCodeBlock
props.description: Toggle a code block at the selection.

props.name: insertHorizontalRule
props.description: Insert a horizontal rule after the current block.

props.name: insertTable
props.description: Insert a table after the current block. Replaces an empty paragraph in place.

props.name: addTableRow
props.description: Add a row after the current table row.

props.name: addTableColumn
props.description: Add a column after the current table column.

props.name: deleteTableRow
props.description: Delete the current table row. Deletes the table when it is the last row.

props.name: deleteTableColumn
props.description: Delete the current table column. Deletes the table when it is the last column.

props.name: deleteTable
props.description: Delete the current table.

props.name: subscribe
props.description: Subscribe to selection and document updates so pressed states refresh.
